architecture: Contributors agreed on balancing the technical demands of robust infrastructure with attention to a user-friendly and accessible interface. Future discussions may benefit from focusing on specific technical choices and further integration of user experience considerations into system design and monitoring.
other: - Implementing GitHub Actions for CI/CD is agreed upon for initial deployments, with a potential future shift to Infrastructure as Code using Terraform. Starting with AWS-native monitoring tools will provide foundational insights, with plans to integrate OpenTelemetry for more comprehensive observability as demands grow.
